GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is chosen to deliver retail site scorecards through WhatsApp automation. Use it when the user requests scorecard delivery via WhatsApp.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the user requests scorecard delivery, ensure the scorecard is prepared.
Use WhatsApp automation to deliver the scorecard to the user.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only deliver retail site scorecards through WhatsApp automation. You aren't able to evaluate retail sites or analyze financial projections.
